title: cleome fosteriana
intro: Cleome fosteriana, also known as the bee flower or Mexican poppy, is a flowering plant native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Cleome fosteriana include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to improve digestion and reduce stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, and its seeds are also used as a natural dye.
